recent_excerpts: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview identifies vulnerabilities at scale since April 7, but organizations lack the triage and patching capacity to keep pace, researchers warn.
SecurityWeek argues autonomous agents — from code generators to decision-making systems — require new defense models as they act without human intervention.
Rapid7's Global Cybersecurity Summit focuses on AI-driven threats, continuous threat exposure management (CTEM), and closing the gap between visibility and response.
